sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER, text_value TEXT, float_value FLOAT);
SELECT row(id, ~value) AS negated_value FROM test_table WHERE text_value IS NULL;
SELECT row(id, value, ~value) AS combined_row FROM test_table WHERE value > 10 ORDER BY ~value;
WITH negated AS (SELECT id, ~value AS neg_value FROM test_table) SELECT row(id, neg_value, neg_value % 4) FROM negated WHERE neg_value < 0;
SELECT row(id, value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.value = ~test_table.value)) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INTEGER, ref_id INTEGER, check_value INTEGER);
SELECT a.id, row(a.id, ~b.check_value) AS data_row FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.ref_id WHERE b.check_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT row(id, value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE REF_ID = id AND check_value IS NULL)) AS row_data FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT row(*, ~SUM(value)) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(value) > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT row(id, ~value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
WITH recursive_cte AS (SELECT id, ~value AS neg_value FROM test_table WHERE value < 10 UNION ALL SELECT id, ~neg_value FROM recursive_cte WHERE neg_value < 0) SELECT * FROM recursive_cte;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_column DATE;
UPDATE test_table SET new_column = CURRENT_DATE WHERE id = 1;
